parameters.query:
INSERT INTO bruna_debug_execucoes (
  etapa,
  node_name,
  account_id_chatwoot,
  contact_id_chatwoot,
  conversation_id_chatwoot,
  phone,
  status_lead,
  ultima_intencao,
  evento_sistema,
  input_json,
  output_json,
  erro
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.etapa }}',
  '{{ $json.node }}',
  {{ $json.json_payload?.chatwoot?.account_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.json_payload?.chatwoot?.contact_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.json_payload?.chatwoot?.conversation_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.json_payload?.lead?.phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.json_payload?.status_lead || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.json_payload?.ultima_intencao || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.json_payload?.evento_sistema || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  CAST({{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json?.json_payload || {}).replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }} AS JSON),
  CAST({{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json?.json_payload || {}).replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }} AS JSON),
  NULL
);
